summary: Two targeted improvements addressing external reviewer feedback: (1) added godoc comment to RenderINI documenting that empty section names produce invalid INI output, and (2) added TestRenderPastePipeline_doesNotMutateInputs test verifying input isolation. Both changes are minimal, correct, and well-integrated.

tests_checklist.item: New mutation-safety test covers input isolation for RenderPastePipeline
100% statement coverage on both config/ and plugins/ packages

security_checklist.item: No user inputs to validate (pure functions with typed Go params)

architecture_checklist.item: Solution is as simple as possible
No scope creep beyond reviewer feedback

defensive_checklist.item: RenderINI documents caller responsibility for non-empty section names
RenderPastePipeline proven to not mutate inputs via new test
